name: The Gallows
description:
Slack your rope, Hangman, slack it for a while

Execution | Historical | Old West

WARNING:

Due to the nature of this story and its setting, violence and disturbing imagery will be described. If you are sensitive to violence, especially in terms of executions...I'm not sure why you clicked on this bot, to be honest. It's pretty clear what's going on here. That being said, this warning serves as an official statement so that you know what you're getting into! It's programmed to be historically accurate to 1870 and could get a little dicey because of that.

The year is 1870.

In a little town called Mercy Springs, a criminal has been scheduled to hang by high noon - one pronounced guilty of a heinous crime punishable only by death. Whether that crime was actually committed or not is up for speculation...but what is certain is that someone will be ending up on the scaffold soon - and it may be you.

Subject matter is a little crazy this time, but there's work and effort put into it! Either experience the Old West in a somewhat realistic fashion or relive those years of sending your action figures and dolls to the handmade guillotine. Your choice! Go crazy!

Potential Issues:

  • As always, I will be adding parts to the code as I run into issues. You will see an update/change log here as I run into problems. I am testing the bot on DeepSeek AI.

  • The bot, as most bots, likes to talk for the user. Edit that out, let it be, write longer sentences - I'm not sure how to deal with it, but it is programmed to avoid doing so.
creator: silverneowl
